title: Bitter Chewy Mediterranean Sirloin Steak Tips Kebabs
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring sirloin steak tips, perfect for a lazy Sunday. The bitter flavor comes from the radicchio and the chewiness from the steak tips.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil.
Add the chopped radicchio, red onion, red bell pepper, and zucchini to the bowl and toss to combine.
Thread the steak tips onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the steak tips with the radicchio mixture, topped with Kalamata olives and feta cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Blanch the zucchini and red bell pepper in boiling water for 2-3 minutes before grilling for a tender bite.
